about.title: About Me
about.bio1: I am a Full Stack Developer passionate about creating modern, scalable, and visually impactful web experiences. I specialize in React, JavaScript (ES6+), and building robust architectures for both frontend and backend.
about.bio2: When I'm not in front of a coding terminal, you can find me assembling and flying FPV drones, exploring the world of 3D printing, or working on my next cosplay project. I am always looking for new technical and creative challenges.
